patch:
--- a/barrel_shift.v
+++ b/barrel_shift.v
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 module barrel_shifter_64bit(
   input [63:0] data_in,
   input [5:0] shift_amount,
   output reg [63:0] data_out
 );
-  always @(data_in) begin
+  always @(data_in or shift_amount) begin
     data_out = data_in >> shift_amount;
   end
 endmodule
